title: CommandF3
description: A lightweight mod adding a /f3 command to toggle the debug screen, show hitboxes, and reload chunks. Perfect for macOS users!.
body:
# CommandF3

A simple client-side mod that adds an **/f3** command to the game. 

I made this because playing Minecraft on a Mac or a compact keyboard means streaching your finger a killometer just to check coordinates. And the keybinds like `Fn + F3 + B` are annoying, and some keyboards don't even have a function row. This mod fixes that by moving those keys into your chat.

### What it does:
* `/f3` – Toggles the full debug menu overlay.
* `/f3 hitboxes` – Shows or hides entity hitbox borders.
* `/f3 reload` – Forces a clean reload of all visible world chunks.
